story_summary: A single brunette woman speaks at a school morning assembly from a podium in a gymnasium while TikTok caption text overlays the frame, then the clip ends on a TikTok-branded outro card.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus contact-sheet review and exact midpoint frame extraction
source_sampling.notes: One major cut lands at 6.916667 seconds, where the live assembly footage switches to a TikTok end card.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and should be used as the default Shotstack audio source.

scenes.summary: An adult brunette woman in a pale fitted long-sleeve top, dark mini skirt, and black heels stands beside a wooden podium on a school gym floor, speaking into a handheld microphone while a seated audience watches from the bleachers.

camera.framing: vertical full-body to three-quarter podium-side framing
camera.movement: handheld phone capture with small operator sway and subject-driven turns at the podium

on_screen_text: A bold white meme-style sentence spans the middle of the frame.
TikTok watermark and username appear in the lower corners.
scenes.environment: Indoor school gymnasium with a U.S. flag, bleachers full of students, and a wooden speaking podium.

scenes.summary: A dark TikTok-branded outro card fills the entire frame, showing the TikTok logo with loading/search UI on a black background.
on_screen_text: TikTok logo and a search-bar style username card appear as part of the platform end slate.
scenes.environment: No physical environment; the frame is a platform outro graphic on a dark background.
